name: simple_from
sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

name: aliased_from
sql: SELECT * FROM users AS u WHERE u.tenant_id = :tenant AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

input_sql: SELECT * FROM users JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = users.id
name: join
sql: SELECT * FROM users JOIN users AS u2 ON u2.id = users.id WHERE ((users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL) AND u2.tenant_id = :tenant) AND u2.deleted_at IS NULL

name: subquery_aliasing
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL) AS u

input_sql: WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM users) SELECT * FROM x
name: cte_rebinding
sql: WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL) SELECT * FROM x

input_sql: SELECT id FROM users UNION ALL SELECT id FROM users
name: union_branches
sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT id FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

input_sql: SELECT u.id, (SELECT count(*) FROM users u2 WHERE u2.id = u.id) AS c FROM users u
name: correlated_subquery
sql: SELECT u.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users AS u2 WHERE (u2.id = u.id AND u2.tenant_id = :tenant) AND u2.deleted_at IS NULL) AS c FROM users AS u WHERE u.tenant_id = :tenant AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

input_sql: SELECT id FROM users INTERSECT SELECT id FROM users
name: intersect_branches
sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL INTERSECT SELECT id FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

input_sql: SELECT id FROM users EXCEPT SELECT id FROM users
name: except_branches
sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL EXCEPT SELECT id FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

name: uppercase_identifier
sql: SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

input_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users) inner1) inner2
name: three_level_nesting
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL) AS inner1) AS inner2

input_sql: SELECT u1.id, u2.id FROM users u1 JOIN users u2 ON u1.manager_id = u2.id
name: self_join_aliased
sql: SELECT u1.id, u2.id FROM users AS u1 JOIN users AS u2 ON u1.manager_id = u2.id WHERE ((u1.tenant_id = :tenant AND u1.deleted_at IS NULL) AND u2.tenant_id = :tenant) AND u2.deleted_at IS NULL

input_sql: WITH RECURSIVE chain AS ( SELECT id, manager_id FROM users WHERE manager_id IS NULL UNION ALL  SELECT u.id, u.manager_id FROM users u JOIN chain c ON u.manager_id = c.id) SELECT * FROM chain
name: cte_recursive
sql: WITH RECURSIVE chain AS (SELECT id, manager_id FROM users WHERE ((manager_id IS NULL AND users.tenant_id = :tenant) AND users.deleted_at IS NULL) AND users.tenant_id = :tenant UNION ALL SELECT u.id, u.manager_id FROM users AS u JOIN chain AS c ON u.manager_id = c.id WHERE u.tenant_id = :tenant AND u.deleted_at IS NULL) SELECT * FROM chain

input_sql: SELECT * FROM /* attempt at hiding */ users
name: comment_inline
sql: SELECT * /* attempt at hiding */ FROM users WHERE users.tenant_id = :tenant AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
